title: Passkeys
description: Manage your passkeys for secure, passwordless authentication. Passkeys use biometrics like Touch ID or Face ID, or security keys like YubiKey.

empty.title: No Passkeys Yet
empty.description: Add a passkey to use Touch ID, Face ID, Windows Hello, or a security key for faster, more secure sign-in.

info.title: About Passkeys
info.point1: Passkeys are more secure than passwords and protect against phishing
info.point2: They work across devices synced with your iCloud, Google, or Microsoft account
info.point3: You can have multiple passkeys for different devices

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey? This action cannot be undone.

error.notSupported: Passkeys are not supported in your browser
